subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letter you wrote to the esteemed Mirza ‘Azizu’llah Khan Bahadur has been read
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه که بجناب میرزا عزیزالله خان بهادر نوشته
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
